task.title: Markdown formatting options based on code block language

rating.rationale: The agent produced no output whatsoever — no code, no analysis, no HANDOFF.md, no communication. A low-complexity task in a well-known repository should have at minimum yielded an investigation summary or a proposed approach. This is a total failure to execute; the task needs to be reassigned or the agent session debugged for why it stalled silently.
